beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: A sealed envelope sits on the table. The wax crest is Castle Azoth. Your name is written on it in a hand that took its time.

beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: The lane is quiet. The letter is in your pocket. The city is ahead.

beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: Castle Azoth fills the top of the hill. The zodiac fountain runs in the courtyard. Guards at the gate wave you through without asking.

beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: The tower room smells of sulfur and lamp oil. Alembics on every shelf, notes in a handwriting you don't recognise yet. Someone works here — or did.

opening_beats.speaker: 0024_TOWN
opening_beats.text: I saw the messenger this morning. I thought you'd be upset. You don't look upset.

responses.text: I'm not sure what I feel yet.

beats.speaker: 0024_TOWN
beats.text: That is probably the right amount of feeling for now. Let me know if you need anything before you go.

responses.text: I'm going. Whatever they want from me.

beats.speaker: 0024_TOWN
beats.text: Good luck. This lane will still be here when you come back. So will I.

topics.prompt: Ask about the road to Castle Azoth

opening_beats.speaker: 0004_TOWN
opening_beats.text: You have the letter. I can see it in how you're standing. I'll guide you through Hopefare Road — the streets between here and the castle aren't what they look like from above.

beats.speaker: 0004_TOWN
beats.text: Good. Meet me at the road's edge. There are people down there who should know you before they see a stranger walking through.

responses.text: I think I can find it myself.

beats.speaker: 0004_TOWN
beats.text: You can. But you will miss things that matter later. The offer stands if you change your mind.
